title: NZ AJCC (8th edition) haematology mycosis fungoides or sezary syndrome clinical N category
description: A clinical regional lymph node stage (cN) of a mycosis fungoides or sezary syndrome cutaneous lymphoma before initiation of treatment, using the AJCC cancer staging manual (8th edition).
